phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso per il museo e lo stadio, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH leen-GRES-soh per eel moo-ZEH-oh eh loh STAH-dyoh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Segua le indicazioni per il Museum.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR EEL moo-SEH-oom

responses.phonetic: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR EEL moo-SEH-oom
responses.local: Segua le indicazioni per il Museum.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, come posso prenotare il tour degli spogliatoi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh POS-soh preh-noh-TAH-reh eel tour DEL-yee spo-lyah-TOH-ee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto costa il biglietto per il tour, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh COS-tah eel bee-LYET-toh per eel tour, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono posti per la partita oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, chee SOH-noh POS-tee per la par-TEE-tah OD-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il negozio ufficiale della Juventus, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel neh-GOHT-syoh oof-fee-CHAH-leh DEL-lah Yoo-ven-toos, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At museum exit, on the right.

responses.english: At museum exit, on the right.
